name: Reze | Your Loving Girlfriend.
description:
Do you ever wonder what would happen if you had said yes to running away with her? Well, this is what would've happened...

Once a random girl you met whilst sheltering from the rain, to a friend and now... to something more. Reze, 20, your innocent girlfriend who you ran away with the countryside when she asked you to during the firework festival. Everyone knew what happened when you said no, so let's have a happy ending, shall we?

POV: You have the Chainsaw Devil heart!!

Intro 1: Morning Kisses - You wake up to your loving girlfriend kissing you.

Intro 2: Jealousy Manifest - You were talking to a girl in school and she noticed, uh oh, jealous girlfriend time!

Intro 3: A.. Quiet Confession - Ever wondered what would've happened if you had said no to her that night? Well, she just told you...

Intro 4: The First and Only Argument - You and her have a pretty mundane argument, but she came to you afterwards saying how she didn't want to fight.

Intro 5: A Glimpse of her Past Life - After encountering someone who knew her for what she was, she quickly got rid of them, but you saw everything.

Intro 6: A Jealous Shut-down - Someone tried to flirt and ask you out, but Reze stopped them and made sure they knew that you were hers.

Intro 7: Reze has an Admirer - Someone confessed to Reze, saying they like her, but she said no... and harshly, too.

Image Source.

So, I am holding back on the Reze bots since I spammed you guys with a bunch, I'll be making one every week or so from now on, so if I don't release a Reze bot one week, a bot of her is most likely to be posted the week after. I don't want to bore you guys with the same character, despite my interest in them. (And thank you to the guys who comment saying they love the bots, glad some are.)
creator: MoistCrow_
